mapper.select:
SELECT id, tenant_id, message_id, biz_id, biz_type, topic, tag, sharding_key, message_body, send_status, retry_count, max_retry, next_retry_time, send_time, confirm_time, error_msg, exchange, routingKey, correlationId, messageType, cost_time , broker_ack_time , network_cost_time , broker_process_cost_time , is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM mq_send_record
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND message_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.messageId}, '%')
AND biz_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.bizId}, '%')
AND biz_type LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.bizType}, '%')
AND tag LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tag}, '%')
AND send_status LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.sendStatus}, '%')
AND send_time LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.sendTime}, '%')
AND confirm_time LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.confirmTime}, '%')
AND error_msg LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.errorMsg}, '%')
